title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Analytics Platform
description: Real-time analytics platform for FIFA World Cup 2026 built with FastAPI, ReactJS, MongoDB and AWS. Features live match tracking, player statistics and predictive dashboards.

title: AgriMate AI Platform
description: Generative AI platform for agriculture sector. Built LLM-powered agent workflows, REST APIs with Django/FastAPI and ReactJS frontend with Kafka event-driven architecture.

title: VaultShare
description: Secure document sharing and storage platform with role-based access control, encryption and audit trails for enterprise use.

title: YOLOv5 Object Detection System
description: Real-time object detection system using YOLOv5 for industrial quality control and factory automation. Deployed at scale serving 980K+ daily users.

title: DSE Stock Market Scraper
description: Automated data scraper and analytics dashboard for Dhaka Stock Exchange (DSE). Tracks stock prices, volumes and market trends in real-time.

title: Call Centre CRM
description: Full-featured CRM system for call centre operations with ticket management, agent performance tracking, customer interaction history and real-time reporting.

title: Inventory & Distribution Management
description: Enterprise inventory and distribution management system for warehouse and retail outlets. Built with Python Django and deployed on Azure Cloud.

title: EDCL ERP System
description: 14-module ERP system for EDCL covering HR, payroll, procurement, inventory and finance. World Bank SEQAEP project integration.

title: EduTube Learning Portal
description: Online educational video portal with course management, student tracking and interactive content delivery for e-learning.

title: EATL AppStore
description: Mobile application marketplace for EATL with app discovery, download management and developer portal for publishing applications.

title: Attendance Management System
description: Biometric-integrated attendance management system with shift scheduling, leave management and automated payroll integration for 1000+ employees.

title: Stock Price AI Assistant
description: AI-powered stock price prediction and market analysis assistant using LLMs, RAG pipelines and real-time market data.
